basic_details.job_title: ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Young Professional II and Field Assistant Posts
basic_details.post_name: Young Professional II and Field Assistant

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics/Agriculture/Biotechnology with at least one year of experience in wheat for YP II; Intermediate/12th pass for Field Assistant.
qualification.details: Young Professional II (YP II): Master degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics/Agriculture with specialization in Plant Breeding and or Genetics/ Biotechnology/ Plant Biotechnology/ M Tech Biotechnology. Experience of more than one year for working in wheat. Field Assistant: Intermediate/ 12th Passed. Experience of working in field and lab, field lay out, single plant harvesting, tagging etc. in wheat.

salary_details.pay_scale: Young Professional II: Rs. 42,000/- per month. Field Assistant: Rs. 22,500/- per month with 10% increment in the third year.
salary_details.details: Young Professional II (YP II): Rs. 42,000/- per month (Fixed) Field Assistant: Rs. 22,500/- per month (Fixed) & 10% increment in third year

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the ICAR-IARI recruitment is 21st June 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach the specified email address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the post names for which ICAR-IARI is recruiting?
faq.answer: ICAR-IARI is recruiting for the posts of Young Professional II and Field Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional II post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the Field Assistant post is Intermediate or 12th pass.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional II position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Young Professional II position is Rs. 42,000/- per month (Fixed).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date is 29th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies in this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies available for the Young Professional II and Field Assistant posts.

faq.question: Q10. What is the experience required for the Young Professional II post?
faq.answer: The Young Professional II post requires at least one year of experience in working with wheat.
